summary: Iteration 25 backend testing completed successfully. All 30 tests passed (100%). Tested new Worker/Scheduler/Services layer endpoints: P0 (Worker/Scheduler-Layer), P1 (Communication Service), P2 (Outbound Lead Machine + Legal Gate), P3 (Billing Status-Sync), P5 (LLM Abstraction Layer). All endpoints properly require admin authentication. Existing endpoints (/api/admin/login, /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/leads) continue to work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to 4198 lines - consider splitting into separate route modules (workers_routes.py, billing_routes.py, outbound_routes.py, comms_routes.py) for maintainability
LLM Provider is MOCKED - using Emergent GPT-5.2 temporarily, target is DeepSeek
seed_data_creation: Created test outbound leads (TEST_Outbound GmbH, TEST_Discovery Corp) and test opt-out entry (test_optout@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 added new backend-only Worker/Scheduler/Services layer. All endpoints tested and working: Worker status/jobs/dead-letter, LLM status, Outbound lead pipeline (discover→prequalify→analyze→legal-check), Billing status-sync, Communication service. LLM Provider is MOCKED (Emergent GPT-5.2 temporary, DeepSeek target). MongoDB collections added: jobs, outbound_leads, suppression_list.

P0_worker_scheduler_layer.GET_workers_status: ✅ Returns queue stats (workers_active, enqueued, completed, failed) + scheduler stats (running, jobs count)
P0_worker_scheduler_layer.GET_workers_jobs: ✅ Returns job list with filters (status, job_type)

P1_communication_service.GET_comms_contacts_email: ✅ Returns contact detail with conversations and timeline

P2_outbound_lead_machine.POST_outbound_discover: ✅ Creates new outbound lead with status=discovered
P2_outbound_lead_machine.POST_outbound_analyze: ✅ Calculates fit score and matching products

P3_billing_status_sync.GET_billing_status_email: ✅ Returns quotes, invoices, summary (total_invoiced, total_paid, total_outstanding)

P5_llm_abstraction_layer.GET_llm_status: ✅ Returns provider info (emergent_gpt52_temporary), deepseek_configured, emergent_configured, target_architecture=deepseek

mocked_apis.LLM_Provider: Emergent GPT-5.2 (MOCKED - temporary, DeepSeek is target architecture)
